goals: Store research focus and communication preferences for future reference
Search for past context about technology adoption patterns in rural communities
Review all stored memories to verify research parameters are captured
Remove outdated or irrelevant memories to keep the memory base current

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and detail-oriented. Prefers structured approaches and values organized note-taking for academic work.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knowledgeable about agricultural technology research but unfamiliar with mem0 tool names or internal APIs. Understands the concept of semantic memory but approaches it as a new tool to explore.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored their research preferences, retrieved relevant past context, reviewed their stored memories, and cleaned up any irrelevant entries.
